title: Thozhar Cheguevara
description: An innocent boy hailing from a village is struck by an unfortunate incident, which webs him in conflicts that endanger his life and his community under threat. His idyllic life is shattered, deftly turning his world upside down. A bounty is announced on the boy's name to kill him on the same night. Whether he can recoup and overcome the labyrinth of conflicts forms the crux of the story
